identity_resolution.claim_level: configured and source-route context; official extract required for final reliance
identity_resolution.official_upgrade_required: Current registry extract or licensed provider dossier with source hash.

target_contacts.claim_level: public/team/contact context if source-enveloped; otherwise route context

competitor_intel.next_action: Run full source-first competitor field extraction before claiming addresses, revenue, hiring count or employees.

talent_intel.claim_level: hiring and skill context; live counts require fresh archived replay

customer_signal.claim_level: public customer/partner context; concentration requires seller/provider proof

source_labels: news discovery route / Google News RSS / Rechtspraak metadata (news discovery route:PAS...

guardrails: LinkedIn/social is discovery or corroboration only.
Competitor and hiring metrics remain market context until refreshed and source-enveloped.
Finance, ownership and UBO stay gated until official/provider documents with source hash are attached.
Robots.txt, ToS and paywalls must be respected; no bypass language is allowed.
